name: conversions
title: Conversions
description: Goal/conversion events (q9 analytics parity): an app records one row when something worth counting happens (signup, purchase, form submit) -- event_type + optional session/user + a JSON metadata blob. append storage, admin-read; a rollup can group_by event_type for a funnel. Recorded server-side by whatever app owns the goal (generic create), never a public write. See app-analytics.
